## Constitution Compliance

- [ ] CHK001 Feature stays within platform administration (no customer-app workflows)
- [ ] CHK002 Actors are internal Scrappy roles only
- [ ] CHK003 Read-first: mutations justified and audited if present
- [ ] CHK004 Non-Goals respected (inventory, POS, trips, expenses, etc. excluded)

## [Category 1]

- [ ] CHK005 First checklist item with clear action
- [ ] CHK006 Second checklist item
- [ ] CHK007 Third checklist item

## [Category 2]

- [ ] CHK008 Another category item
- [ ] CHK009 Item with specific criteria
